boot.title: Preparing launcher
boot.subtitle: We are loading the session, visual theme, and initial data. This screen will stay visible until everything is ready.
boot.error_subtitle: Initialization did not complete successfully. Retry to prepare the launcher again.

dashboard.hero_desc: Explore your own unique world, survive the night, and create anything you can imagine with the selected version!

settings.confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to delete all data? The launcher will restart.
settings.cache_cleared_desc: Temporary application space has been freed.
settings.settings_saved_desc: Your configurations have been successfully saved.

skin_studio.title: Skin Studio
skin_studio.subtitle: Open your skin in a larger view, test a local PNG, and leave the groundwork ready for editing inside the launcher later.
skin_studio.texture_subtitle: See the raw PNG exactly as Minecraft reads it.
skin_studio.control_subtitle: Import a PNG from your PC and temporarily replace the current preview.
skin_studio.compatibility_desc: Supports 64x64 and 64x32 PNG skins. Import is local for now, which makes it ideal for previewing before editing or applying changes.
skin_studio.workflow_subtitle: This view is ready for the next step: editing skin zones and publishing changes.
skin_studio.step_one_desc: Inspect your official skin and confirm how the full body looks with your current account.
skin_studio.step_two_desc: Import a custom skin from your PC to compare it visually without replacing the official one yet.
skin_studio.next_phase_desc: The natural next step is zone editing, layers, and change saving directly from this same screen.
skin_studio.no_skin: There is no skin available to display right now.
skin_studio.official_restored_desc: You are back to the active skin from your Minecraft account.
skin_studio.invalid_skin_desc: Only PNG files are allowed for Minecraft skins.
skin_studio.invalid_dimensions_desc: The skin must be 64x64 or 64x32 pixels.
skin_studio.skin_loaded_desc: The preview now uses your local file.

onboarding.subtitle: Login to begin your adventure
onboarding.premium_desc: Connect your Minecraft account to access the launcher.
onboarding.login_success_desc: You have successfully logged in with your Microsoft account.
onboarding.login_error_desc: There was a problem connecting with your account.

library.instances_desc: Each build has a different visual intent and mood for the player.
library.featured_desc: Content blocks designed for packs, worlds, and presets.

servers.lounge_desc: Everything is a mockup for now, but the experience already feels social and alive.
